Statistical analyzes : Simon Couillard

Project : ACQ5 multicohort

Reference number : 1206

By : Pascal Charland, Samuel Lemaire-Paquette, and Simon Couillard,

Last update : 2026-04-08

  • Table 1
  • Spline Curves Analysis: ACQ-5 Mean Score vs Treatment Response
  • Forest Plots: Baseline ACQ-5 Mean Score vs Clinical Parameters and Translational Parameters
  • Forestplot : Subgroups
  • Density plots
  • Stacked figures

Table 1

Frequencies and percentages will be presented for nominal variables. Means (standard deviation) and medians [interquartile range] will be presented for continuous variables. For comparisons between two groups, Mann-Whitney U tests will be used for continuous variables and Fisher’s exact tests for categorical variables. For comparisons between three or more groups, Kruskal-Wallis tests will be used for continuous variables and Fisher’s exact tests for categorical variables.

Spline Curves Analysis: ACQ-5 Mean Score vs Treatment Response

PRISMA

Unadjusted

Adjusted v1

Adjusted for BEC, FeNO and FEV1 V1 (Post_FEV1_L).

## Since column 1 of mat contains values below 0, linreg has been set to TRUE.

T2 composite

Adjusted only for FEV1 V1 (Post_FEV1_L) and T2 composite.

## Since column 1 of mat contains values below 0, linreg has been set to TRUE.

BOOST

Unadjusted

Adjusted v1

Adjusted for BEC, FeNO and FEV1 V1 (fev1_attack).

## Since column 1 of mat contains values below 0, linreg has been set to TRUE.

Oracle DREAM

Unadjusted

Adjusted - v1

GINA steps = 5 for all observations and no data for Allergic Rhinitis, variables weren’t included in the final model.

Adjusted - T2 composite

GINA steps = 5 for all observations and no data for Allergic Rhinitis, variables weren’t included in the final model.

Includes T2_composite (T2 Low/Low, T2-Mid, T2-High/High) treated as an ordinal variable where it replaces BEC × FeNO.

Forest Plots: Baseline ACQ-5 Mean Score vs Clinical Parameters and Translational Parameters

Univariable

PRISMA

BOOST

FeNO

RASP-UK

FeNO + RASP-UK

Oracle imputed full

Oracle imputed Any ACQ

Multivariable

2 regressions : one based on all Clinical Parameters and one based on all Translational Parameters. All clinical parameters are included in the same multivariable models, same for translational parameters.

ORACLE studies are adjusted for additionnal parameters. Two versions on Forest Plot are given ; One showing only the ‘main’ predictors and the other one showing every variables included.

PRISMA

Adjusted for blood eosinophils, FeNO, and FEV1% predicted

BOOST

Adjusted for blood eosinophils, FeNO, and FEV1% predicted

FeNO

The variable Sp_Eos_optimised was not include because missing = 59%

RASP-UK

FeNO + RASP-UK

Adjusted for blood eosinophils, FeNO, and FEV1% predicted

Oracle imputed full

Enrolled trial is considered in the model.

Oracle imputed Any ACQ

Enrolled trial is considered in the model.

Master

Pooled estimate

Forest plot

## png 
##   2

## png 
##   2

## png 
##   2

Forestplot : Subgroups

Oracle Dream

Unadjusted

Adjusted

Adjusted for same variables as SPLINE curves (Full multivariable). When possible interaction of FeNO and BEC were included. For T2, need to remove BEC and FeNO from model.
